summary.business_type: Local Service — Professional Organizer / Decluttering (Service-Area Business, Warsaw)
top_findings: Fabricated aggregateRating (5.0, 24 reviews) shipped site-wide with no reviews on the page (testimonials section commented out) — schema policy risk
hreflang en-US points to /en which returns 404
Four /uslugi/* service pages are indexable but missing from sitemap.xml
Sanity Studio /studio is publicly indexable (index, follow)
FAQPage + aggregateRating + homepage breadcrumb leak onto every page via global layout
quick_wins: Remove or replace placeholder google-site-verification token
Remove aggregateRating until real reviews exist
Add robots noindex to /studio and Disallow: /studio in robots.txt

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS enforced; http->https and www->non-www both 308
Strong security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options DENY, nosniff, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
Server-side rendered (not SPA), fully crawlable; Vercel edge cache HIT + Brotli
Clean robots.txt with sitemap reference; correct 404 handling
html lang=pl set correctly

findings.title: Service pages missing from sitemap
findings.description: sitemap.ts outputs only /, /blog, /polityka-prywatnosci + blog posts; the four /uslugi/{slug} pages return 200 and are statically generated but are not listed.
findings.recommendation: Add all services slugs and blog category slugs to app/sitemap.ts

findings.title: hreflang en-US resolves to 404
findings.description: Rendered <link rel=alternate hreflang=en-US href=.../en>; /en returns 404. alternates.languages declares a non-existent English site.
findings.recommendation: Remove alternates.languages in layout.tsx until /en exists

findings.title: Sanity Studio indexable
findings.description: /studio returns 200 with meta robots index, follow. CMS admin should not be indexable.
findings.recommendation: Add robots noindex to app/studio and Disallow: /studio in robots.ts

findings.title: Placeholder GSC verification token in production
findings.description: meta google-site-verification content=your-google-verification-code is live.
findings.recommendation: Insert a real token or remove the verification field

findings.title: Duplicate viewport meta
findings.description: Two <meta name=viewport> render (manual head tag with maximum-scale=5 + Next default).
findings.recommendation: Remove the manual tag; use Next export const viewport

findings.title: Canonical omits trailing slash
findings.description: Canonical is https://ministerstwoporzadku.pl while the site serves /.
findings.recommendation: Standardize on one form

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Clear Experience/Expertise: named founder, real photo, first-person practitioner voice
Single blog post is ~1,100 words, in-depth, well-structured, with author bio and internal links
Coherent local-service homepage narrative (About, process, services, portfolio, contact)

findings.title: No visible social proof
findings.description: Testimonials component is commented out in app/page.tsx:19; no reviews anywhere on the site. Major trust/E-E-A-T gap and the reason the schema rating is invalid.
findings.recommendation: Ship a real testimonials/reviews section

findings.title: Thin content library (1 article)
findings.description: /blog hub has almost no content to rank or build topical authority.
findings.recommendation: Publish 6-10 local-intent articles

findings.title: Weak trust details
findings.description: Business email is a personal Gmail; no visible pricing despite Cennik nav label.
findings.recommendation: Use a domain email; add price anchors

findings.title: No dedicated long-form service/about pages beyond templates
findings.description: /uslugi pages are template-driven; limited unique depth.
findings.recommendation: Expand with FAQ, process, local proof

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique keyword-targeted title + meta description on home, service, and blog pages
Exactly one H1 per page; clean blog heading hierarchy
Keyword-rich local metadata (decluttering warszawa, district names)

findings.title: Homepage title too long (~84 chars)
findings.description: Title truncates in SERP.
findings.recommendation: Trim to <=60 chars, lead with primary keyword

findings.title: H1 is a keyword-less slogan
findings.description:
Twoj spokoj zaczyna sie tutaj.

has no target keyword.
findings.recommendation: Add a keyword-bearing H2 near the top or blend keyword into H1

findings.title: Blog metaTitle drops brand, awkward grammar
findings.description: Organizacja przestrzeni zaplanuj wnetrze przed zabudowa.
findings.recommendation: Add brand suffix; smooth grammar

findings.title: Blog alternates set en -> same Polish URL
findings.description: Declares English version at the Polish URL.
findings.recommendation: Remove until EN exists

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Rich @graph: ProfessionalService+LocalBusiness with geo, areaServed, openingHours, hasOfferCatalog
Service + Offer on each service page; BlogPosting on posts; WebSite; sameAs to Instagram/TikTok

findings.title: aggregateRating without reviews (policy violation)
findings.description: ratingValue 5.0 / reviewCount 24 declared with no reviews rendered and no review nodes. Risks manual action or ignored markup.
findings.recommendation: Remove aggregateRating until real, visible reviews exist; then add matching review items

findings.title: Global schema leakage
findings.description: FAQPage, aggregateRating, and homepage BreadcrumbList render on every URL (blog/service) from app/layout.tsx, creating context mismatches.
findings.recommendation: Move these into the homepage route; give each route its own correct breadcrumb

findings.title: dateModified hard-set to datePublished
findings.description: BlogPosting never reflects updates.
findings.recommendation: Set dateModified from Sanity _updatedAt

findings.title: Author is a bare Person name
findings.description: No @id/url/sameAs weakens author E-E-A-T.
findings.recommendation: Link author to a real Person entity

findings.title: Breadcrumb items use fragment anchors
findings.description: Breadcrumbs point to /#services rather than pages.
findings.recommendation: Point breadcrumbs at real URLs

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Next.js prerender + Vercel edge cache HIT (fast TTFB)
Font strategy strong for CLS: swap, subset, only used weights, adjustFontFallback
Hero + logo preloaded with fetchPriority high; preconnect/dns-prefetch; Brotli

findings.title: Fake responsive hero srcset
findings.description: Preload srcset uses ?w= query params on a static /public JPEG; params don't resize, so every device downloads the full image.
findings.recommendation: Serve hero via next/image or generate real width variants

findings.title: No next-gen image formats
findings.description: Hero JPEG, OG/logo PNG.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP/AVIF

findings.title: No field CWV data available
findings.description: Assessment is lab-only; connect GSC/CrUX for field data.
findings.recommendation: Connect Search Console

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Server-rendered content readable by AI crawlers without JS
Clear entity (LocalBusiness), FAQ content, answer-first blog article

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.description: No /llms.txt summary file.
findings.recommendation: Add /llms.txt with services, area, key pages

findings.title: Small corpus limits citability
findings.description: One article limits citable passages and topical authority.
findings.recommendation: Expand content cluster

findings.title: Fabricated rating undermines trust signals
findings.description: LLMs increasingly weigh trust; fake rating hurts.
findings.recommendation: Fix per schema finding

findings.title: No extractable review quotes
findings.description: No plain-text testimonials for AI to cite.
findings.recommendation: Ship real testimonial quotes

categories.name: Images
what_works: 100% alt-text coverage across sampled pages (8/8, 3/3, 2/2)
Hero preloaded; reasonable file sizes (~45KB hero)

findings.title: OG image is the logo, not a photo
findings.description: Share image declared 1200x630 but is a logo PNG.
findings.recommendation: Design a proper social card with a real photo

findings.title: Raster images not next-gen
findings.description: JPEG/PNG instead of WebP/AVIF.
findings.recommendation: Adopt next-gen formats via next/image

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Remove fabricated aggregateRating (or restore real testimonials + review nodes)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Scope FAQPage/aggregateRating/breadcrumb to the homepage route only
Fix fake hero srcset (serve via next/image)
Real Search Console verification token + submit sitemap
Trim homepage title to <=60 chars; add keyword-bearing H2

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Expand /uslugi pages with FAQ, process, before/after, price anchors
Add real testimonials + linked author Person entity

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Connect GSC + GA4; monitor /uslugi indexation and CWV field data
Add /llms.txt; keep content answer-first for AI citation
Set dateModified from Sanity _updatedAt; refresh posts ~90 days
Build local citations + pursue reviews to legitimately restore rating
